response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the role's core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB), recent AI-agent and MCP work directly matching a key requirement, and a consistent track record of craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) across multiple senior roles.
strengths: Direct match on TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB with recent AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work
10+ years across web, backend, and DevOps with senior/staff-level ownership
Strong engineering discipline — TDD, pairing, CI/CD, workshops, and open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin/Java exposure is limited and dated (mostly via D-language projects)
Basic German may matter depending on team working language
